$comment: Evaluation-regression case (mode 2) for caustic_depth_fade — a ZERO-coefficient formula. Expected values hand-derived from the FULL-tier smoothstep fade f = 1 - t*t*(3 - 2t), t = saturate(depth/maxDepth).
notes: Smootherstep-shaped fade: 1.0 at the surface, 0.0 at maxDepth, 0.5 at the midpoint. The depth=10 (> maxDepth) point pins the saturate() clamp — without it the over-range input would drive the cubic negative. An edit swapping the FULL smoothstep for the APPROXIMATE linear fade shifts the midpoint from 0.5 (unchanged) but the quarter-point from 0.84375 to 0.75, outside the 1e-4 default tolerance.
